=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_shortImportAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import { Schema as S } from "effect"

export const pipe(MyStruct) = S.Struct({
  id: S.Number,
  name: S.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_shortImportAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import { Schema as S } from "effect"

export const MyStruct: S.Struct<{ readonly id: S.Number; readonly name: S.String; }> = S.Struct({
  id: S.Number,
  name: S.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_shortImportAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import { Schema as S } from "effect"

export const MyStruct = () => S.Struct({
  id: S.Number,
  name: S.String
})


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Make Schema opaque" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_shortImportAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import { Schema as S } from "effect"

export const MyStruct_ = S.Struct({
  id: S.Number,
  name: S.String
})
export interface MyStruct extends S.Schema.Type<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export interface MyStructEncoded extends S.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export type MyStructDecodingServices = S.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
export type MyStructEncodingServices = S.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
export const MyStruct: S.Codec<MyStruct, MyStructEncoded, MyStructDecodingServices, MyStructEncodingServices> = MyStruct_;


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Make Schema opaque with namespace" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_shortImportAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:22
import { Schema as S } from "effect"

export const MyStruct_ = S.Struct({
  id: S.Number,
  name: S.String
})
export interface MyStruct extends S.Schema.Type<typeof MyStruct_> { }
export namespace MyStruct {
    export interface Encoded extends S.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyStruct_> { }
    export type DecodingServices = S.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
    export type EncodingServices = S.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyStruct_>;
}
export const MyStruct: S.Schema<MyStruct, MyStruct.Encoded, MyStruct.DecodingServices> = MyStruct_;
